message:
test(rpc): add extension_ui_response legacy id alias roundtrip test

The upstream TypeScript Pi agent accepts both "requestId" and the legacy
top-level "id" field when routing extension_ui_response messages back to
pending UI requests. This test validates that the Rust implementation
correctly handles the legacy alias path:

- Creates a confirm-type extension UI request with id "req-legacy-1"
- Sends an extension_ui_response using the top-level "id" field (not
  "requestId") to match the legacy format
- Verifies the response is correctly routed: RPC server acknowledges with
  resolved=true, and the extension manager's request_ui future completes
  with the expected confirmed=true value and cancelled=false

This closes a coverage gap identified in the drop-in parity ledger where
the id/requestId alias handling was documented but not exercised by any
deterministic test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
